    descriptors
  GENERATOR
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/gen/low_descriptor_shard.py"

    "descriptors.h"
  ARGS
    "--descriptor-set=wasm_core_simd128"

    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/gen/low_descriptors.py"

)
